subject: Re: Radio Silence
body:
I'll see you tonight , 

----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, May 2, 2007 8:31:38 AM
Subject: FW: Radio Silence


Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein


-----Original Message-----
From: Farkas, Andrew [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, May 02, 2007 7:07 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Radio Silence

Is it something I said? I leave for dubai saturday. Turkey then
5/8-5/10. Sultan coming to this part of the world thereafter. What are
your plans?
--------------------------------------------------------
